birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is common throughout New Guinea, except on the Huon Peninsula, eastern Sepik-Ramu, and most of the northern parts of the southeastern peninsula. The species inhabits foothill rainforest and secondary growth between elevations of , although they can be found up to elevations of and in lowland plains where there is suitable vegetation. It is typically found more in trees than in the undergrowth, most commonly from above the ground, but can be found from ground level to in the canopy
